features: [ 12V Power Supply Specs:] 12V 2A Power Supply, Worldwide Input AC 100V-240V 50/60Hz; Output: DC 12Volt 2Amp 24Watt (max). 12V DC Power Supply Self-Adapting Barrel jack size: 5.5mm * 2.5mm center positive (+) . Prefect replacement for all 12V 0-2Amp power adapter, Such as 12V 1A power adapter, 12V 2A power adapter, compatible with 12Vdc 0.5A, 1A, 1.5A, 2A (500mA,1000mA, 1500mA, 2000mA) devices

[ EXTRA LONG POWER CORD: ] 12V AC/DC Adapter with 6ft Power cord has good bending resistance and ensures a long service life. Long enough from your device to the wall outlet, Portable power adapter provide convenience for charging on different occasion, for example travel, home, car, office, etc.

[ for Yamaha Keyboard Power Supply Widely Used: ] 12 volt power supply would meet your 90% power need for 12V household and office electronics. Suitable for Yamaha Keyboard, CCTV Cameras, Security Camera, LED Strip light, led tape light, keyboard, BT speakers, GPS, webcam, router, External Hard Drive, hard disk box, Scanner and more 12V electronics. 12V power cord and Bending Resistance is not Easy to Damage, convenient to use at home.

[ for External Hard Drive Power Supply, High Quality & Safety Guarantee: ] AC/DC adapter 100-240v 50/60hz 12V, Class 2 power adapter Level VI Energy Efficiency (Save 15%-20% Electricity Charge than Level V). Mareisa Power Supply Certified by: UKCA, CE, FCC, ETL Safety Certificates Approved. Anti-interference Magnetic Ring to avoid EMI (Electromagnetic Interference) / Short Circuit & Over Voltage & Current Protection / Low Fever, Made by PC and ABS flame-retardant plastic. No noise, no fire hazard.
[ What you get: ] 1*12Vdc Power adapter, 1*12Vdc power cord, 5*different sizes DC Connector (4.0*1.7mm, 3.5*1.35mm, 3.0*1.1mm, 2.5*0.7mm, Led terminal connector)
description: Product Description MAREISA 12V DC Power Supply, 12V 2A Power Adapter with 5 tips 12V 2A Power supply Product specification Input: 100~240V AC, 50/60Hz. Output voltage: 12V DC 24W. Output current: up to 2 Amps Power Cable length: 6feet (180cm) What you get: 1*12V 2A AC adapter, 1*12V DC power cord, 5*different sizes DC Connector (4.0*1.7mm, 3.5*1.35mm, 3.0*1.1mm, 2.5*0.7mm, Led terminal connector) 5* Different DC connectors size: 4.0*1.7mm, 3.5*1.35mm, 3.0*1.1mm, 2.5*0.7mm, Led terminal. Five terminals are included, greatly expanding the use of this power adapter in 24V.
